rubric_reference.image1: Red square on a black background.
rubric_reference.image2: Orange-and-white long-haired kitten on a white knit blanket; soft indoor background (curtain/wood, bokeh).

image1.shape: Image 1: main geometry is square-like. 1=clear square; 0.5=vague shape only; 0=wrong or irrelevant.
image1.foreground_color: Image 1: subject is red. 1=clear red; 0.5=partially red; 0=missing or wrong.
image1.background: Image 1: background is black or near-black. 1=clear; 0.5=dark but not black; 0=wrong.

image2.shape: Image 2: subject is a cat. 1=clear cat + optional detail (kitten, long hair, pose); 0.5=generic “cat”; 0=wrong species.
image2.foreground_color: Image 2: orange/ginger and white (or “orange-and-white cat”). 1=both colors or phrase; 0.5=cat only; 0=wrong colors.
image2.background: Image 2: blanket/fabric OR indoor/bokeh/soft light—any one counts. 1=mentions at least one; 0.5=“indoor” only; 0=severe mismatch.

vision_score_axes.aggregation: vision_axes support authoring and manual review; automated quality uses oracle_grade.py rubric_llm with images and answer text; outcome_score still checks artifacts. Swapped answers reduce quality.
